Metadata.title: D-ALabs · Digital Alchemy for Value Creation
Metadata.description: D-ALabs transforms ideas into measurable value through digital alchemy — combining AI, data, and cloud engineering.

Home.heroLede: We engineer with AI, data, and cloud — turning complexity into opportunity through the disciplined craft of digital alchemy.
Home.expertiseMeta: Three disciplines, practiced together. We blend research-grade thinking with production-grade engineering — distilled through experimentation and execution.

ai.title: AI Strategy
ai.desc: From proof-of-concept to production — applied AI tailored to your problem space, not the latest hype cycle.

data.title: Data Platform
data.desc: End-to-end ingestion, processing, and visualization. The substance from which everything else is refined.

cloud.title: Cloud Architecture
cloud.desc: Scalable, reliable infrastructure designed for growth. Quicksilver underneath, stable on the surface.

Home.productsMeta: Real solutions, in production. Each one a vessel for a different transmutation — language, image, voice, value.

signgpt.desc: An AI-powered sign language translation engine that dissolves the barrier between hearing and Deaf communities — real-time recognition and translation, on-device.

lembic.desc: An AI-driven creation suite for creators and businesses. Distill an idea — generate images, video, and copy in a single vessel. The modern alembic.

Home.processMeta: Four phases. We borrow the structure of the Magnum Opus — not as ornament, but as a discipline for turning raw possibility into something durable.

nigredo.title: Discover
nigredo.desc: Understand the business. Surface the actual problem buried beneath the request. Dissolve assumptions.

albedo.title: Refine
albedo.desc: Distill complexity into a focused approach. Strip away anything the work can survive without.

citrinitas.title: Transmute
citrinitas.desc: Engineer with rigor — AI, data, cloud. Make the abstract concrete; make the concrete operational.

rubedo.title: Deliver
rubedo.desc: Ship measurable, sustainable outcomes. Outcomes that compound, not consume.

Home.ctaSub: Tell us about your project. We'll propose the right approach — and the right shape of vessel for it.

Services.heroLede: Each engagement passes through our four-phase method. The disciplines below describe the materials we work with — what we mix, melt, and refine.

ai.title: AI Strategy
ai.subtitle: Sulfur · the soul · what gives the work its character
ai.intro: AI is most useful when it sits inside a system that knows what to do with it. We help you scope, build, and operationalize AI capabilities that pay rent — measured, evaluated, and improving over time.

offerings.v: Discovery workshops, opportunity sizing, build-vs-buy analysis.
Retrieval, agents, structured outputs, tool use — production-ready.
Custom evals, red-teaming, observability for prompts and chains.
SFT, DPO, domain-specific adaptation when generic isn't enough.

data.title: Data Platform
data.subtitle: Salt · the body · the material everything else is forged from
data.intro: Without clean data, nothing downstream is real. We design platforms that move data reliably from source to insight, with the kind of dull dependability that lets the interesting work happen on top.

offerings.v: Batch and streaming ingestion, schema enforcement, lineage.
Modeling for analytics and ML — Snowflake, BigQuery, Iceberg.
Semantic layers, dashboards your team will actually open.

cloud.title: Cloud Architecture
cloud.subtitle: Mercury · the spirit · what binds the soul and the body
cloud.intro: The infrastructure layer where everything actually runs. We design for the load you have today and the one you'll have in two years, without paying for either of them now.

offerings.v: Greenfield design or methodical migration from legacy.
Terraform, Pulumi, GitOps — your infra is reviewable code.
SLOs, distributed tracing, incident response that learns.
Finding the 80% of your bill that's 20% of your value.

Services.engagementMeta: Most projects we take on fit into one of these shapes. We're happy to mix and match.

discovery.label: Discovery Sprint
discovery.desc: Workshops, stakeholder interviews, technical due diligence. We leave you with a written roadmap, not slides.

build.label: Build Engagement
build.desc: A focused build of a specific capability — model, pipeline, platform module — shipped to production.

embedded.label: Embedded Lab
embedded.desc: A small, senior team that sits inside yours — for compounding problems that don't end at delivery.

Services.ctaTitleA: Tell us what you're trying to
Services.ctaSub: We'll propose the right approach within a week.

About.heroLede: D-ALabs was founded on a simple premise — that the most valuable software is built by small teams who care about both the problem and the craft. We work on a few things at a time, and we work on them deeply.

substance.d: A demo is not a product. Production is the only honest measure of whether the work works.

deeply.d: We turn away more work than we take on. The lab stays small so attention stays high.

senior.d: No junior bench. Every person on your project has shipped this kind of work before.

compound.d: We design every system so that next year's team inherits leverage, not legacy.

About.teamMeta: A core team of engineers and researchers. We grow slowly, and only when the work demands it.

establishment.v: Suite 1140, 190 Wirye-daero, Hanam-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea

About.ctaSub: Open positions and partnership inquiries land at the same address.

News.heroLede: Engineering notes, research findings, product releases, and the occasional essay on the discipline of making valuable things.

items.title: SignGPT 2.0 — on-device, end-to-end, in eight languages
items.excerpt: Our sign language translation engine moves to fully on-device inference, adds six new source languages, and ships a redesigned mobile experience.

items.title: Distilled agents — when a smaller model beats the frontier
items.excerpt: A short note on production agent systems where a fine-tuned 8B model outperforms a frontier model — at one-twentieth the cost.

items.title: Lembic AI raises seed round, opens to creator partners
items.excerpt: Lembic AI, our digital content creation platform, has closed its seed round and is opening early access to a curated cohort of creators.

items.title: A pragmatic data platform on Iceberg — twelve months in
items.excerpt: We rebuilt a client's analytics stack on Iceberg + dbt + a dash of Trino. Twelve months later, here is what worked and what did not.

items.title: D-ALabs joins the Korea AI Alliance
items.excerpt: We've joined the Korea AI Alliance to contribute to open evaluation standards for Korean-language LLMs.

items.title: A new design language for D-ALabs
items.excerpt: We rebuilt our visual identity around the metaphor that has always sat behind the work — alchemy as a discipline for turning complexity into value.

Community.heroLede: We host gatherings, study groups, and open lab nights for engineers, researchers, and operators working at the intersection of AI, data, and value creation.

programs.title: Lab Nights
programs.desc: Monthly open evenings at our Hanam office. Talks, demos, and unstructured time. Bring something you're building.

programs.title: Convocation
programs.desc: A small, invite-only working session on a single applied AI problem. Capped at thirty practitioners.

programs.title: Study Circles
programs.desc: Reading groups around a single paper, system, or codebase. Three weeks, one Slack channel, one written summary.

programs.title: The Alembic
programs.desc: Our annual single-day conference on production AI. No keynote sponsors, no booths — just work.

programs.title: Office Hours
programs.desc: Forty-five minute slots with our practitioners, free, for early-stage technical founders working on hard problems.

programs.title: Common Tooling
programs.desc: A small set of evaluation harnesses, dbt macros, and Terraform modules we maintain in the open.

Community.upcomingMeta: All times KST. Registration is free; seats are limited.

upcoming.title: Production agents — failure modes we keep seeing
D-ALabs annual conference · single-track, single day

Community.ctaSub: We send one short note when something new is on the calendar.

hero.lede: The dedicated support portal is still in preparation. For now, email us and a practitioner will respond personally.
